# Project dependencies
flask==2.3.0
requests[security]==2.31.0   # inline comment

# range specifiers leave version empty
django>=4.0
numpy~=1.24
urllib3!=1.26.0
pytest<8.0
six>1.10

# bare name, no version
pyyaml

# environment marker
typing-extensions==4.5.0; python_version<'3.9'

# option / include lines (all skipped)
-r other-requirements.txt
-c constraints.txt
--hash=sha256:deadbeef
-e git+https://example.com/repo.git#egg=somepkg
